Notice And Motion Enforce Settlement Pursuant To 664.6 & For Judgment And For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF R&D MANAGEMENT'S MOTION ENFORCE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO 664.6 & FOR JUDGMENT AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS.
Appearances: R.H. Carlson of the Carlson Law Offices (510.301.9121) for plaintiff and moving party; Francis M. McKeown of McKeown & Associates (510.647.0600) for defendant and responding party.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/LMG) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
---
After hearing the court ruled as follows: plaintiff's motion to enforce settlement is granted. Plaintiff to obtain $2000 as reasonable attorney fees. Parties notified of the court's ruling by telephone. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order.

Notice And Motion To Compell Answer/Further Answers To General And Special Interrogatories, Responses And Further Responses To Request For Production And Atty'S Fees/Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF R&D MANAGEMENT Motion To Compel Answer/Further Answers To General And Special Interrogatories, Responses And Further Responses To Request For Production And Attorney's Fees/Sanctions is Granted, as follows: Form Interrogatories 4, 7 -7.3, 14.1, 50-50.2. Special Interrogatories 3, 79, 11, 15, 12, 16, 19. Requests for production: 1, 2. The Opposition has no argument in opposition to the motion's requests for further responses to these demands. Money sanctions in the sum of $800 are awarded, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Discovery responses are due within 15 calendar days of notice of this order. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge Curtis A. Karnow. Not reported. (CK/610)
